---
pagetitle: "Bio196-22 Computing for Bioinformatics"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
          #title-block-header {
            display: none;
          }
          .course-title-page {
            min-height: 62vh;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
          }
          .course-title-page h1 {
            font-size: 3rem;
            line-height: 1.08;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
          }
          .course-title-page .subtitle {
            font-size: 1.35rem;
            color: #52616b;
            margin-bottom: 1.8rem;
          }
          .course-title-page .authors {
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            color: #1d2733;
          }
        </style>
---

```{=latex}
\iffalse
```

::: {.course-title-page}
# Bio196-22 Computing for Bioinformatics {.unnumbered .unlisted}

::: {.subtitle}
Linux, HPC, environments, workflows, and reproducible analysis
:::

::: {.authors}
Yucheng Zhang and Shirley Li  
Tufts University
:::
:::

```{=latex}
\fi
```
